# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Transform : AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31
  Resources:{
    IAMPolicyFunction:
      Type:"AWS::IAM::Policy"
      Properties:{
        PolicyName:"IAMPolicyForFunctions"
        Roles:[
          Fn::GetAtt:"LambdaFunctionsRole",
          "Arn"]
        Actions:[
          "*"
        ]
        Resources:[
          Fn::Join:["","arn:aws:s3:*:*:/aws-sam-cli-managed-default-samclisourcebucket-170000000000-us-east-1"]
        ]
      }
    LambdaFunctionsRole:
      Type:"AWS::IAM::Role"
      Properties:{
        AssumeRolePolicyDocument:{
          Version:"2012-10-17",
          Statement:[
            {
              Action:[
                "sts:AssumeRole"
              ],
              Effect:"Allow",
              Principal:{
                Service:[
                  "lambda.amazonaws.com"
                ]
              }
            }
          ]
        },
        RoleName:{
          Fn::Join:["" ,[
              "AWS-SAM-",
              {"Ref":"AWS::StackName"},
              "-LambdaFunctionRole"
            ]]
        }
      }
    }

---

Answer in Markdown (not code)

1. What do you understand from CloudFormation?

   Answer:  [Amazon Web Services (AWS)](https://aws.amazon.com/what-is-cloud-formation/) is a model for how your AWS infrastructure is configured and operated, and includes many resources that are used together to form a higher level abstraction of the underlying components. 

2. What will be created when we deploy the template?

   Answer:  The CloudFormation stack contains three resources that creates an IAM Role and attach to Lambda functions for managing access to S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS and CloudWatch. The IAM Role is used across multiple Lambda function and can have wildcard actions for flexibility as we add new features.
